mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM system_notice
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM system_notice WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY publish_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO system_notice (title, content, type, status, publisher_id, publish_time, view_count, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{status}, #{publisherId}, #{publishTime}, #{viewCount}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE system_notice SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
